notes: The file builds the category-theoretic API (id, comp, identity laws) for FormalGroupHom and then develops the series-level right- and left-inverse theory for mulByNatHom when (n : R) is a unit, culminating in series injectivity. The left-inverse proof uses a bootstrap: a second application of compInverseOfUnit to g derives h = f from associativity, avoiding any need to prove left-inverse directly. Six of 23 declarations are terminal API lemmas unused within the file (designed for downstream consumers T-IV-2-008/T-IV-3-007); packaging the inverse as a FormalGroupHom (requiring preserves_add for the inverse series) is explicitly deferred.
